input: What is your return policy?
expected_output: Customers can return items within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Items must be unused and in original packaging. To initiate a return, contact support with your order number.

input: How long does standard shipping take?
expected_output: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) and overnight options are also available at checkout.

input: Can I return a product I bought on sale?
expected_output: Sale items are eligible for store credit only, not cash refunds. The 30-day return window still applies. Final sale items marked as non-returnable cannot be returned.

input: My order hasn't arrived after 10 business days. What should I do?
expected_output: If your order hasn't arrived within 10 business days of the shipping date, please contact support with your order number. We will investigate with the carrier and reship or refund if the package is confirmed lost.

input: How do I track my order?
expected_output: Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can use this number on the carrier's website or in your account dashboard under Order History.

input: Do you ship internationally?
expected_output: Yes, we ship to over 40 countries. International shipping typically takes 10–21 business days depending on destination. Customs duties and import taxes are the customer's responsibility.

input: What payment methods do you accept?
expected_output: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are encrypted via SSL. We do not accept checks or wire transfers.

input: My credit card was charged but I never received an order confirmation. What happened?
expected_output: This usually means the email was filtered as spam or the email address entered was incorrect. Check your spam folder first. If not there, contact support with the card last four digits and charge amount so we can locate your order.

input: Can I split payment across two cards?
expected_output: Split payment across two cards is not currently supported. You can use a combination of one card and a gift card or store credit, however.

input: How do I apply a promo code?
expected_output: Enter your promo code in the 'Discount Code' field on the checkout page before completing your order. Only one promo code can be applied per order. Codes cannot be applied retroactively.

input: How do I reset my password?
expected_output: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email address. You will receive a reset link valid for 24 hours. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder or contact support.

input: How do I update my billing address?
expected_output: Log in to your account, go to Account Settings, then Billing Information. You can update your billing address there. Changes apply to future orders only and do not affect past invoices.

input: Can I have multiple shipping addresses saved?
expected_output: Yes, you can save up to 5 shipping addresses in your account under Address Book. You can select or edit them at checkout.

input: How do I delete my account?
expected_output: To delete your account, go to Account Settings and select 'Close Account' at the bottom of the page. This action is permanent. Any remaining store credit or active subscriptions must be resolved before deletion.

input: I'm getting an error when trying to log in. What should I do?
expected_output: First, try resetting your password. If the issue persists, clear your browser cache and cookies and try again. If you're still locked out after 5 failed attempts, your account may be temporarily suspended — contact support to unlock it.

input: What is your subscription plan and how does billing work?
expected_output: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually. Annual plans receive a 20% discount. Billing occurs on the same date each cycle. You can view your next billing date and invoice history in Account Settings under Subscription.

input: How do I cancel my subscription?
expected_output: You can cancel your subscription at any time from Account Settings under Subscription. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period. Cancellations are not prorated.

input: Will I get a refund if I cancel mid-cycle?
expected_output: Subscription cancellations are not eligible for prorated refunds. You retain access through the end of the paid period. Annual plan refunds are considered within 14 days of purchase on a case-by-case basis.

input: How do I upgrade from a monthly to an annual plan?
expected_output: Go to Account Settings, select Subscription, and choose 'Switch to Annual'. The remaining value of your current monthly period will be credited toward the annual plan. The new billing cycle begins immediately.

input: Can I pause my subscription instead of canceling?
expected_output: Yes, subscriptions can be paused for up to 3 months. During the pause, you will not be billed and will lose access to premium features. Go to Account Settings, Subscription, and select 'Pause Subscription'.

input: What is your most popular product?
expected_output: Our best-selling product is the Pro Toolkit Bundle, which includes our three flagship tools at a bundled discount. It has a 4.8/5 rating across 2,000+ reviews.

input: Do your products come with a warranty?
expected_output: All hardware products come with a 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. Software products come with a 90-day satisfaction guarantee. Warranty does not cover physical damage or misuse.

input: How do I file a warranty claim?
expected_output: Contact support with your order number, a description of the defect, and photos if applicable. Our team will assess the claim within 3 business days and either issue a replacement or repair instructions.

input: Are your products compatible with Mac and Windows?
expected_output: Yes, all software products support macOS 11+ and Windows 10/11. Mobile apps are available for iOS 15+ and Android 10+. Hardware accessories are platform-agnostic via USB-C or Bluetooth.

input: Do you offer a free trial?
expected_output: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available for all subscription plans. No credit card is required to start. At the end of the trial, you can choose a plan or your account reverts to the free tier.

input: How do I contact customer support?
expected_output: Support is available via live chat (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm ET), email at support@example.com (response within 24 hours), and phone at 1-800-555-0199 (Mon–Fri, 9am–5pm ET). A help center with FAQs is also available 24/7.

input: What are your support hours?
expected_output: Live chat and phone support are available Monday through Friday, 9am to 6pm Eastern Time. Email support is available 24/7 with a typical response time of under 24 hours. The help center is always available.

input: I was promised a callback but never received one. What happened?
expected_output: We apologize for the missed callback. Please contact support again with your ticket number or the name used when requesting the callback. We will prioritize rescheduling within 1 business day.

input: How do I escalate an unresolved support ticket?
expected_output: If your ticket has been open for more than 3 business days without resolution, you can request escalation by replying to the ticket email with 'ESCALATE' in the subject line. A senior support agent will be assigned within 1 business day.

input: Do you have a community forum or user group?
expected_output: Yes, we have an active community forum at community.example.com where users share tips, ask questions, and connect with the product team. Monthly virtual meetups are also hosted for Pro and Enterprise subscribers.
